# Delivery Package Type Number Parcels

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:b89957d7d07f4d3269e752c71675921b863468114cfd1c19987f589d0c3227fd
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds the number_of_parcels on package type
and its related on package. As so it gives a simple way
to have the number of pieces/boxes of the package type
without playing with the package levels if this latter
is overkill.

This field is set manually by the user on package type.

```{contents}
:local: true
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.delivery_package_type_number_parcels.tests.test_package_type_number_parcels.TestStockQuantPackageDelivery.test_put_in_pack_choose_carrier_wizard
documentation:
Trigger the 'choose.delivery.package' wizard and choose a package type with
a number of parcels > 0.
    - check the related has the right value in the wizard
    - check the related has the right value in the created package
